name: AMGEN INC
business: Amgen discovers, develops, manufactures and delivers innovative medicines to fight some of the world's toughest diseases. Amgen operates in one operating segment: human therapeutics.
sellsTo: healthcare providers (physicians, clinics, dialysis centers, hospitals, pharmacies)

exposures.sentence: Amgen discovers, develops, manufactures and delivers innovative medicines to fight some of the world's toughest diseases.

catalysts.event: Transition of rocatinlimab global development and commercialization to Kyowa Kirin
catalysts.sentence: In the first quarter of 2026, Kyowa Kirin will assume full responsibility for rocatinlimab worldwide, except that Amgen will continue to manufacture rocatinlimab and perform other transition activities for an agreed upon period of time.
